question: Malicious flash drive
canonical_answer: USB sticks are leveraged where an attacker needs physical access to a computer. The first notorious incident was observed back in 2010 when the notorious Stuxnet worm was distributed via USB sticks to launch attacks on the networks of an Iranian facility

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+

appears_in.answer:

Rubber Ducky USB is an example.
